summary: Exp50-Exp57 readback and official VOID data-generation audit completed.

Official Kubric Gate8 generation not run because B did not pass.

Kubric preference forward / zero-gap / one-step not run because no native data exists.

Final decision: data-mismatch hypothesis remains untested; blocker is TensorFlow-compatible Kubric plus Blender/bpy environment.
